## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run prisma:validate`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] UI flow checked in browser, if relevant

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No `.env`, secrets, tokens, database dumps, backups, or `storage/` files are included.
- [ ] No real client, matter, contact, party, invoice, seal, audit, or attachment data is included.
- [ ] Permission, audit, and privacy boundaries were not bypassed.
- [ ] Schema or migration changes are explained, if any.
